content: I'm so grateful to have such a wonderful family. My wife, Emily, and our two kids, Jackson and Lily, are my rock. We live in Minneapolis, MN, and love it here.
That's great to hear! It's always important to have a supportive family. What do you like to do together as a family?

We love to spend time outdoors - we've got a big backyard with a garden, and we like to go on hikes and bike rides together. I've also been getting into gardening and mushroom foraging, which has been a lot of fun.
That sounds like a great way to spend quality time together. As a Video Game Streamer and Content Creator, do you find it challenging to balance your work and family life?

Yeah, it can be tough at times. But my family is really understanding, and they know how much my work means to me. I've been trying to set aside dedicated time for streaming and content creation, so I can focus on my family during other times.

That's great that you're prioritizing your family time. Have you thought about involving your kids in your streaming or content creation? Maybe they could even help you with some of your videos or streams.

Actually, Jackson has been really interested in helping me with my streams. He's only 10, but he's already shown a real talent for it. And Lily loves to watch me play games and give me feedback - she's my toughest critic!
That's amazing! It's great that you're involving your kids in your work and passions. Do you have any fun plans for the family in the coming months?

We're actually thinking of taking a trip to the Wisconsin Dells in June. We've heard great things about the waterparks and amusement parks, and the kids are really excited. And I've been training for a triathlon, so I'm hoping to fit in some training sessions while we're on vacation.
That sounds like a great trip! You'll have to be sure to pack plenty of sunscreen and swimwear. Have you thought about how you'll balance your training with family time during the trip?

Yeah, I've been thinking about that. I'm planning to get up early and fit in some training sessions before the rest of the family wakes up. And maybe we can even do some family-friendly activities, like tennis or pottery, that will get everyone involved and active.

That's a great plan. It's always important to prioritize family time, but also make time for your own passions and interests. I'm sure you'll have a great time on your trip and make some wonderful memories with your family.
